subject: debug(pwa): temporarily enable DebugPill in all environments
body:
Enable debug pill and logging in production builds for PWA testing.
Three changes, all marked TEMPORARY with revert instructions:

1. _layout.tsx: DebugPill loaded unconditionally (was __DEV__ only)
2. debugLog.ts debugAdd(): __DEV__ gate removed (was no-op in prod)
3. debugLog.ts global error capture: __DEV__ gate removed

Revert after verifying PWA on deployed site.

Tags: debug, pwa, temporary
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: added
Epic: pwa-alignment
Semver: patch
